name: stallpass-shipyard
description: Codex-native StallPass release workflow plugin for planning, implementation, review, launch audits, and Google Play preparation.

interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin for StallPass that packages planning, implementation, adversarial review, debugging, launch auditing, and Google Play submission workflows around the existing Claude and Codex CLI orchestration scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use Shipyard to harden StallPass for Google Play release
Plan and implement a StallPass feature with dual-agent review
Audit launch blockers and missing Play Store requirements
